prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南大学在福建省物理类最低位次分别为约26075→33369→23835→22733→19899名，整体呈波动中前移趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），近3年累计前移约3900名；2025年基准约19899名，为近5年最高水平；该校在福建省物理类招生计划：2021年238人、2022年222人、2023年207人、2024年209人、2025年223人；2026年计划233人，较2025年扩招约4.5%，扩招幅度适中，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021年第144名→2022年第130名→2023年第118名→2024年第104名→2025年第93名→2026年第87名，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2023年曾出现师德师风负面事件（教师不配合核酸检测），2024年声誉转为中性/混合（校区争议、分数线持续上涨）；抖音综合热度排名第32位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度有所升温；未见明显投档断档记录；海南大学在第五轮学科评估中未进入A-及以上等级，暂无顶尖学科；但作为综合性大学，法学、计算机、农学等专业有一定社会认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，相关专业报考竞争可能加剧；福建省2026年高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年（约25.23万）增加约6.2%，其中物理类考生按历史比例估算约20.4万人，竞争基数扩大。；海南大学位于海南省海口市，与福建省同属华南地区，气候文化相近，跨省报考意愿中等；该校在福建省招生人数占全国总招生比例约3%-5%（2021-2025年数据），属中等偏下水平，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+4.5%）、软科排名持续上升带来的吸引力增强、福建省考生总数明显增加（+6.2%）以及抖音热度较热反映关注度升温，在2025年基准19899名基础上预计竞争继续加剧，位次进一步前移。预测最低位次约20354名，区间19854–20854名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of Hainan University in Fujian Province's Physics Category were approximately 26075 → 33369 → 23835 → 22733 → 19899, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate increased competition), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3900 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 19899, the highest level in the last 5 years; the university's enrollment plan in Fujian Province's Physics Category: 238 in 2021, 222 in 2022, 207 in 2023, 209 in 2024, 223 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 233, an increase of about 4.5% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Soft Science has been continuously rising: 144th in 2021 → 130th in 2022 → 118th in 2023 → 104th in 2024 → 93rd in 2025 → 87th in 2026, the steady improvement in ranking reflects the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength, increasing its appeal to candidates; in 2023, there was a negative incident regarding teacher ethics (teacher refused to cooperate with nucleic acid testing), and in 2024, the reputation turned neutral/mixed (campus disputes, continuous rise in admission scores); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 32nd (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high, application attention has warmed up; no obvious record of admission gaps; Hainan University did not enter the A- or above level in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, currently no top-tier disciplines; but as a comprehensive university, majors such as law, computer science, and agriculture have a certain degree of social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular socially, and they highly overlap with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors, which may intensify competition for related majors; the total number of candidates in Fujian Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025 (about 252,300), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 204,000 based on historical proportions, expanding the competition base. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, in the same South China region as Fujian Province, with similar climate and culture, and moderate willingness for cross-province applications; the university's enrollment in Fujian Province accounts for about 3%-5% of the total national enrollment (2021-2025 data), which is moderately low, and regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+4.5%), the increased attractiveness due to the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Fujian Province (+6.2%), and the relatively hot Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, based on the 2025 baseline of 19899, competition is expected to further intensify, with rankings moving further forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20354, with a range of 19854–20854.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19854–20854, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19800), you can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 20800), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net and pay attention to lower-ranking majors in Tier 2.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度偏热（推荐），汉语言文学/中文专业热度推荐，会计/财务/审计专业热度推荐，与该校历史类招生专业方向匹配；福建省2026年历史类考生按历史比例估算约6.4万人，较2025年（约6.03万）增加约6.3%，竞争基数扩大。；海南大学位于海南省，与福建省同属华南地区，气候文化相近；该校在福建省历史类招生人数占比较小，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年扩招幅度较大（+6.9%）、福建省历史类考生增加（+6.3%）以及抖音热度较热反映关注度升温，扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，预计竞争略有缓解，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约3486名，区间2986–3986名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan University in Fujian Province's History Category were approximately 3881 → 3087 → 2763 → 3979 → 3319, with significant fluctuations and no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 3319, a notable forward shift of about 660 places compared to 2024 (3979); the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province: 56 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 63 in 2024, 58 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 62, an increase of about 6.9% over 2025, a relatively large expansion that significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen to 87th in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength, which also attracts liberal arts candidates; in 2023, there was a negative incident regarding teacher ethics, which turned neutral/mixed in 2024; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 32nd overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure, indicating increased application attention; Hainan University did not enter the A- or above level in the fifth round of discipline evaluation; liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have a certain degree of social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major is socially popular (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese major is recommended, Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors are recommended, matching the university's History Category enrollment directions; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is about 64,000, an increase of about 6.3% compared to 2025 (about 60,300), expanding the competition base; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, which, like Fujian Province, belongs to the South China region, with similar climate and culture; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian Province's History Category is relatively small, so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings, the relatively large enrollment expansion in 2026 (+6.9%), the increase in History Category examinees in Fujian Province (+6.3%), and the relatively hot Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, the expansion rate slightly exceeds the examinee growth rate, so competition is expected to ease slightly, with rankings moving back slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3486, with a range of 2986–3986.
